expected_pattern: DNA/nuclei; should outline essentially all nuclei.

Activated/regulatory T cells; sparse immune marker.
Intestinal epithelial nuclear transcription factor.
Sparse neuroendocrine or neural structures expected.
NK/senescent T/neural contexts; sparse immune-like signal.
NK-like marker name in panel; should be immune-associated if specific.
Mesenchymal/stromal cells and some immune cells.
Helper T cells and some myeloid contexts.
B cells; should form lymphoid aggregate or scattered lamina propria signal.
T/NK cells; should overlap CD3/CD45.
Dendritic/myeloid antigen-presenting cells.
MAIT/NK/T subsets; immune-rich areas.
Granulocytes; sparse or luminal inflammatory signal.
Endothelium/stromal progenitor; vessel/stromal signal.
Myeloid/NK marker; sparse/patchy.
Goblet-cell/epithelial lectin.
Antigen-presenting cells and some epithelium; immune-rich areas.
Plasmacytoid dendritic cells; sparse.
CEACAM family; epithelial/myeloid localization can occur.
T cells; should overlap CD45/CD7 and subsets CD4/CD8.
Memory T cells; should overlap immune-rich areas.
Activated B/plasma cells; immune-rich lamina propria.
Fibroblast/stromal and T-cell contexts.
Epithelial keratin; limited/patchy in colon is plausible.
Smooth muscle/pericytes/myofibroblasts; fiber-like structures.
Mast cells/interstitial cells; sparse punctate.
IL7R; T-cell subset marker.
Goblet-cell mucin; strong granular/mucus epithelial signal is expected.
Enteroendocrine cells; sparse punctate epithelial cells expected.
Activated fibroblasts; stromal bands.
Basement membrane/vascular ECM; linear structures.
B-cell/follicular dendritic network marker; lymphoid follicles.
Anti-apoptotic marker; lymphocytes/crypt contexts possible.
Blood endothelium; vessel-like loops/tubes.
Proliferating nuclear cells, especially crypt proliferative zones.
Crypt progenitor/stem epithelial nuclear marker.
Cytotoxic T cells; should overlap CD3/CD45.
Endothelium/adipocyte/macrophage contexts; patchy.
Plasma cells and epithelial contexts; should not be universal.
Activated tissue-resident immune cells; sparse/patchy.
Integrin alpha-6; epithelial basement/basal compartments.
Integrin alpha-1; tissue-resident immune/stromal/epithelial contexts.
Macrophages; lamina propria puncta.
Crypt stem/progenitor-associated epithelial marker.
Lymphatic endothelium and fibroblast-like stroma.
Pan-leukocyte; lamina propria and lymphoid aggregates.
Macrophage subset; should overlap CD68/CD206 partly.
Adhesion/stem/immune marker; broad but not pan-everything signal.
NK cells/neural/endocrine contexts; sparse.
Pan-epithelial cytoskeleton.
Macrophage/mannose receptor; should overlap macrophage-rich stroma.

DNA/nuclei; should broadly match Hoechst.
